debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
⊢ Differentiable ℝ g'

failed_attempts:
have : Differentiable ℝ (interpolated_deriv x y f) := by
      unfold GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv
      fun_prop
    simpa [g'] using this
simpa [g', interpolated_deriv] using (Differentiable.interpolated x y f fc).deriv

classical
    have hconst : Differentiable ℝ fun _ : ℝ => (y - x : E n) := differentiable_const
    have hlin : Differentiable ℝ fun t : ℝ => (1 - t) • x + t • y := by
      simpa [g₀, GlobalTheorem.interpolator] using g₀_diff
    have hf' : Differentiable ℝ fun z : E n => fderiv ℝ f z := (fc.fderiv_right (by norm_num)).differentiable
    have hcomp : Differentiable ℝ fun t : ℝ => fderiv ℝ f ((1 - t) • x + t • y) := hf'.comp hlin
    have hinner : Differentiable ℝ fun t : ℝ => ⟪(y - x : E n), fderiv ℝ f ((1 - t) • x + t • y)⟫_ℝ :=
      (hconst.inner hcomp)
    have hg' : g' = fun t : ℝ => ⟪(y - x : E n), fderiv ℝ f ((1 - t) • x + t • y)⟫_ℝ := by
      ext t
      simp [g', interpolated_deriv, nth_partial, inner, dotProduct, Finset.mul_sum, Finset.sum_mul, mul_assoc,
        mul_left_comm, mul_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm, GlobalTheorem.interpolator]
    simpa [hg'] using hinner
simpa [g', deriv_interpolated x y f] using g_diff.deriv

simpa [g', interpolated_deriv] using differentiable_finset_sum
      (s := Finset.univ)
      (f := fun i : Fin n =>
        ((y i - x i) : ℝ) * nth_partial i f (g₀ ·))

classical
    have hg : Differentiable ℝ g := g_diff
    have hgderiv : Differentiable ℝ (deriv g) := (hg.deriv).differentiable
    simpa [g', deriv_interpolated] using hgderiv
